name: Saltimbocca (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the veal scaloppini between pieces of plastic wrap until they are thin.
2. Place a slice of prosciutto and a sage leaf on each of the veal slices.
3. Secure the prosciutto and sage leaf to the veal with a toothpick.
4. Melt the butter in a pan large enough to accommodate all 4 veal slices.
5. Brown the veal on both sides for a few minutes, then sprinkle with fresh pepper and a light amount of salt (prosciutto is already salty).
6. Add white wine and reduce quickly over high heat until almost glazed. The entire process should take no longer than 5 minutes.
7. Serve with instant polenta and/or sautéed mushrooms and parsley (follow package directions).
Yield: 2 servings
